basic_details.job_title: Aavin Tirupur Veterinary Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Tirupur District Cooperative Milk Producers Union (Aavin)
basic_details.short_information: Tirupur District Cooperative Milk Producers Union (Aavin) Veterinary Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Aavin Tirupur Veterinary Consultant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: B.V.Sc & AH with Computer Knowledge and Veterinary Council Registration

all_official_links.label: Download Aavin Tirupur Veterinary Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Aavin Veterinary Consultant post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Veterinary Consultant post is scheduled for 15 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Veterinary Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Veterinary Consultant position will receive a salary of Rs. 43,000 per month, inclusive of allowances.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for the Veterinary Consultant role?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must possess a B.V.Sc & AH degree with computer knowledge and must be a registered Veterinary Practitioner with the Veterinary Council.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Veterinary Consultant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Veterinary Consultant position announced by the Tirupur District Cooperative Milk Producers Union (Aavin).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Aavin Veterinary Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Veterinary Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and Veterinary Council registration.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Veterinary Consultant position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Aavin office in Tirupur, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 1490/ESTT.2/Vet.Route/2020.
